structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Mode Primary Airflow Setpoint Mapping
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In cooling mode, the cooling-loop output is mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map cooling-loop output to active primary airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. If SAT > room temperature, setpoint shall be no higher than minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. 1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: a. The cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. 1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Mode Heating Coil Off
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In cooling mode, the heating coil is OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Heating coil is OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. Heating coil is OFF.

evidence_quote: b. Heating coil is OFF.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Mode Parallel Fan Control for ASHRAE 62.1
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In cooling mode and Occupied Mode, if ventilation is per ASHRAE 62.1, the parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Voz minus half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Voz. Fan airflow setpoint equals Voz minus current primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Cooling AND Occupied Mode AND ventilation per ASHRAE 62.1
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Start parallel fan when primary airflow < Voz - 0.5*Pfan-z; shut off when primary airflow > Voz. Set fan airflow setpoint = Voz - current primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, in Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Voz minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the current primary airflow setpoint.

evidence_quote: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, in Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Voz minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the current primary airflow setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Mode Parallel Fan Control for Title 24
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In cooling mode and Occupied Mode, if ventilation is per California Title 24, the parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Zone-Abs-OA-min minus half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Zone-Abs-OA-min. Fan airflow setpoint equals Zone-Abs-OA-min minus current primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Cooling AND Occupied Mode AND ventilation per California Title 24
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Start parallel fan when primary airflow < Zone-Abs-OA-min - 0.5*Pfan-z; shut off when primary airflow > Zone-Abs-OA-min. Set fan airflow setpoint = Zone-Abs-OA-min - current primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: d. If ventilation is according to California Title 24, in Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Zone-Abs-OA-min minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Zone-Abs-OA-min. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Zone-Abs-OA-min minus the current primary airflow setpoint.

evidence_quote: d. If ventilation is according to California Title 24, in Occupied Mode only, parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Zone-Abs-OA-min minus one half of Pfan-z and shuts off when primary airflow rises above Zone-Abs-OA-min. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Zone-Abs-OA-min minus the current primary airflow setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Designer Must Ensure Ventilation Compliance
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The designer must ensure that the sum of indirect ventilation provided by the fan plus the ventilation provided by the primary air at minimum setpoint meet Standard 62.1 requirements.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Designer must verify that total ventilation (fan indirect + primary air at minimum setpoint) meets Standard 62.1 requirements.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The designer must ensure that the sum of the indirect ventilation provided by the fan plus the ventilation provided by the primary air at minimum setpoint meet Standard 62.1 requirements.

evidence_quote: The designer must ensure that the sum of the indirect ventilation provided by the fan plus the ventilation provided by the primary air at minimum setpoint meet Standard 62.1 requirements.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: In deadband mode, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set active primary airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Deadband Mode Parallel Fan Control for ASHRAE 62.1
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Deadband
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In deadband mode, if ventilation is per ASHRAE 62.1, the parallel fan runs if the active primary airflow setpoint is below Voz. Fan airflow setpoint equals Voz minus active primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Deadband AND ventilation per ASHRAE 62.1
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Run parallel fan if active primary airflow setpoint < Voz. Set fan airflow setpoint = Voz - active primary airflow setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, parallel fan runs if the active primary airflow setpoint is below Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the active primary airflow setpoint.

evidence_quote: c. If ventilation is according to ASHRAE Standard 62.1-2016, parallel fan runs if the active primary airflow setpoint is below Voz. Fan airflow rate setpoint is equal to Voz minus the active primary airflow setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Mode Discharge Temperature Reset (0-50% Loop)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: From 0% to 50% heating loop output, reset the discharge temperature from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating AND Heating Loop output between 0% and 50%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset discharge temperature from current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. From 0% to 50%, the Heating Loop output shall reset the discharge temperature from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Mode Fan Airflow Reset (50-100% Loop)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: From 50% to 100% heating loop output, reset the parallel fan airflow setpoint from the airflow setpoint required in deadband (Pfan-z if deadband setpoint is less than Pfan-z) proportionally up to the maximum heating-fan airflow setpoint (Pfan-htgmax).
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating AND Heating Loop output between 50% and 100%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset parallel fan airflow setpoint from deadband airflow setpoint (Pfan-z if deadband setpoint < Pfan-z) proportionally up to Pfan-htgmax.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: d. From 50% to 100%, the Heating Loop output shall reset the parallel fan airflow setpoint from the airflow setpoint required in deadband (see above; this is Pfan-z if deadband setpoint is less than Pfan-z) proportionally up to the maximum heating-fan airflow setpoint (Pfan-htgmax).

evidence_quote: d. From 50% to 100%, the Heating Loop output shall reset the parallel fan airflow setpoint from the airflow setpoint required in deadband (see above; this is Pfan-z if deadband setpoint is less than Pfan-z) proportionally up to the maximum heating-fan airflow setpoint (Pfan-htgmax).

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Ensure parallel fan minimum airflow at minimum speed exceeds electric heater minimum required airflow.

structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes (after suppression), send 3 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 3 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests.

evidence_quote: a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests.
